programme.desc: Es como una reunión cuando la policía alcanza a alguien que reconoce. La amante de un hombre hace problemas con la esposa. Los oficiales batallan con dos sospechosos que no dan respuestas concretas.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso de robo es perseguido por oficiales. Después de dejar caer una bolsa de metanfetamina, un hombre jura no reconocerla. Un sospechoso de violencia doméstica dice que fue en defensa propia.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso de robo de auto insiste que un monstruo lo persigue. Los policías son testigos de una pelea entre esposos. Los oficiales investigan dos hombres en un auto con drogas escondidas.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un pasajero salta del carro en persecución. Un hombre ingenuo se ve en peligro cuando trata de ganar dinero fácil. Un oficial investiga a un hombre que reconoce caminando en una calle oscura.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre con orden de arresto por un delito hace lo posible para no ser arrestado. Un hombre trata de revelar todo a la policía. Un joven toma malas decisiones que causan un hogar roto.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un intento de fuga termina con un camión destrozado y una visita al hospital. Un hombre reconoce cuidadosamente que los objetos son y no son de él. Un oficial calma una lucha doméstica que empezó con la ropa sucia.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una madre protectora intenta esconder a su hija de la policía. La policía busca las llaves de una guantera. Un conductor de transporte compartido es detenido cuando su pasajero levanta sospechas.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un peatón corre sospechosamente en una calle oscura. Las cosas terminan mal para un sospechoso en moto robada cuando un helicóptero lo rastrea. Una pelea doméstica entre una pareja descubre otros crímenes imprevistos.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Nuevas técnicas forenses utilizadas para resolver casos antiguos: los avances en ciencia y tecnología alientan a los detectives a revisar el pasado con la esperanza de responder preguntas que han quedado sin respuesta y resolver crímenes.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Un perro puede ser el mejor amigo de un hombre muerto. Los perros han sido entrenados para detectar cadáveres, drogas, explosivos y personas desaparecidas. A menudo son los primeros en encontrar la pista esencial que pone en marcha una investigación.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: El veneno es la forma más sutil de asesinato. Los investigadores deben descifrar circunstancias inusuales para resolver los homicidios.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: El residuo más pequeño en la escena puede convertirse a una pista crucial. Los investigadores buscan pruebas forenses tan simples como una mancha en un trozo de cinta o una leve impresión en la tierra.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el condado Lincoln, Nebraska, un traficante de drogas fugitivo se involucró en un tiroteo con policías, hiriendo a dos de ellos, y evitó la captura después de una persecución a alta velocidad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1980, unos extorsionistas colocaron una bomba de casi media tonelada en un casino de Nevada y exigieron un pago de millones de dólares, bajo la amenaza de detonar el dispositivo en caso de no recibir el dinero.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El día antes de Acción de Gracias, una madre descubrió que su hijo de 10 años había desaparecido de la escuela. Nadie sabía cómo podía haber sucedido. En pocas horas, toda la familia del niño estaba desesperada buscándolo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la década de los ochenta, el Departamento de Policía de la Ciudad de Nueva York estaba perdiendo la batalla contra las drogas.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.desc: Mary takes a teaching job in a backwoods community only to clash with a hostile woman bent on driving her away.

programme.desc: Caroline and Charles are devastated when they find out that Mary's sight is deteriorating and cannot bear to tell her the truth.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington Bear: Paddington Gets a Raise/ Bonhomme Paddington/ Everything Comes to Those Who Wait
programme.desc: It was Mr. Brown's birthday and, in his attempt to raise enough money to send him a telegram, Paddington took a work as a model for a painting lesson./ At the Quebec Carnival, Paddington befriended the Bonhomme Carnival.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington Bear: Paddington Hits Out/Ranger Paddington/Paddington's Puzzle
programme.desc: Mr. Curry enters a golf competition with Paddington./While on safari in Africa, Paddington sets out to protect his breakfast eggs from poachers./ Paddington tries his paw at carpentry and comes up with a most novel project: a jigsaw puzzle.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington Bear: Paddington Cleans Up/Riding High/Paddington Dines Out
programme.desc: Paddington is taken in by a confidence man and suddenly finds himself embarking on a new career as a vacuum cleaner salesman. Mr. Gruber's friend has high hopes for his horse. It's Paddington's summer birthday, and the Browns and Mr. Gruber celebrate.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington Bear: Paddington Keeps Fit/Paddington Goes to Washington/Trouble at the Launderette
programme.desc: Paddington invests in world-renowned body building outfit from Grant Stalwart./ Capitol Hill is a big place, but not one where a young bear has a voice.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington Bear: The Case of the Doubtful Dummy/The Greatest Paddington on Earth/Paddington Goes to Court
programme.desc: One foggy evening, Paddington spies a kidnapping/Paddington is a helpful bear even when he doesn't know he's helping./Mr. Gruber brings Paddington to visit the Law Courts. But they get there only to realize that the visitor's gallery is locked.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a friendship bracelet to Catalina for her pen pal Vo the Rover. But when Vo goes missing, Astra and the Galaxy Wings take them to outer space to search for her.

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.desc: Jett delivers a sticker book to a boy named Victor in Mexico whose Mom has a plan: if Victor earns 10 stickers by doing 10 chores, she'll give him a big reward.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito se tropieza con los perros Groseros en la calle cantando Doo Wop. Los reúne con Perro y Gato y forman un grupo de canto para convertirse en súper estrellas. / Lola Caricola tiene que hacer un documental sobre Gato y Perro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Nearburg se convierte en tierra invernal y Perro y Gato, Lola, Dunglap, Mervis y los perros Grasosos aprovechan la oportunidad para pasear en trineo por la nieve. / Perro obtiene un equipo de hipnosis de juguete.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro construye su propio Camión de Monstruos y arrastra a Gato hasta la plaza de Nearburg para participar del Rally de camiones de monstruos. / Lola convence a Perro y Gato de producir miel en el jardín.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato pelean durante el almuerzo y continúan en la cocina, tiran harina, azúcar, chocolate y frutas por todo el lugar. / Perro y Gato heredan algunas tierras en la costa del hermoso lago Wanamaker, empacan sus cosas y se van.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Nearburg se siente atormentado por el gigante gato que les recuerda al monstruo Gatozilla de la película. / Perro y Gato van hacia la Caleta de Nearburg para encontrar el tesoro que se hundió con el pirata Barba Naranja.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Después de un accidente golpeando hierro, Cliff cambia y se convierte en un perro nuevo, promete dejar de hacer cosas malas. / Perro y Gato se convierten en el perro lazarillo para el ciego multimillonario TJ Wolfington.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se transportan al año 3001 para luchar contra el malvado Gran Tito. / Lola vence a Gato por primera vez en la Convención de Inventos de Nearburg y lo que convierte a Gato en un enemigo envidioso.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Walt, el pavo del desfile de Acción de Gracias, aparece en la casa de Perro y Gato buscando refugio. Perro lo hace entrar y el hambriento Gato lo quiere devorar.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es la noche de Halloween y Gato, se disfraza como Duque Kahanamoku de Hawai y Perro, se disfraza como Conde Perrdrácula, salen en busca de dulces. Un vampiro peruano, Nosferacho, muerde a Perro y lo convierte en vampiro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro está entusiasmado porque hoy es el Día de Bromas Raras, la versión del Día de los Inocentes. / Perro y Gato se preparan para volver al reencuentro de la vieja escuela, en donde Gato quiere reavivar su romance con Sally.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el Día Anual de los Padres y, como siempre, Gato y Perro quedan excluidos porque no tienen padres. Perro espera que este año sus padres finalmente aparezcan. Gato insiste en que la búsqueda es en vano.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La nave espacial en la que estaban Perro y Gato cae en un lago congelado donde un monstro del lago termina comiéndoselos como a un bocadillo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Una vez en el pueblo de Perros y Gatos, CatDog logran que todos los perros y gatos de la ciudad se enfrenten los unos a otros. Comienza una batalla en la cual Perro y Gato intentan interferir pero nada sale como lo esperaban.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Hace un año desde que el álter ego del súper héroe Perro el Poderoso salvó al Alcalde Rancio el Conejo de la Parca y ahora Nearburg está celebrando. / Los sobrinos de Tito vienen de visita.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están en la Convención de Fanáticos de Mean Bob, mirando una lucha de WWF entre Mean Bob y su enemigo Evil Eric. / Tito sale a caminar, y Gato y Perro aprovechan para entrar a su casa.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cansados del maltrato de Angélica, los Rugrats van a jugar con otro niño en el parque llamado Josh, quien termina siendo peor que Angélica. Angélica decide denunciar a sus padres cuando ellos tratan de hacerle comer brócoli.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats van a la casa de Boris y Minka para pasar las Pascuas y, por accidente, se quedan todos encerrados en el ático. Para pasar el tiempo, Boris les cuenta a los bebés la historia de Moisés.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Hugo rompe el televisor, los Rugrats usan una caja vacía para crear sus propios programas. Angélica les dice a los bebés que el cielo se está cayendo y que está llegando el fin del mundo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos adopta una mascota, el insecto Melville. Cuando Melville muere, a Carlitos le cuesta mucho aceptarlo y pasa por todos los procesos del duelo. Angélica les pide a los Rugrats que la mantengan alejada de las galletas.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos se enamora de una nueva niña, Megan, y demuestran su cariño molestándose. Los Rugrats están felices de que Angélica se va a mudar lejos, hasta que Tommy comienza a recordar el primer día que todos se conocieron.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El comportamiento de Firulais se vuelve un poco extraño cuando adopta unos gatitos y los esconde en su casa. / Carlitos se contagia de varicela, y Angélica les dice a los bebés que es una enfermedad que te convierte en pollo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras escuchan un programa de radio con el Abuelo, los Rugrats juegan a ser detectives y se preponen resolver un misterio. / Angélica convence a los Rugrats de que puede predecir el futuro, y les pide juguetes y galletas como pago.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo y Julio compiten entre sí grabando los momentos más divertidos de sus hijos para ganar un concurso de un programa de televisión. / Los Rugrats compiten en contra de los bebés McNulty para salvar la medalla de oro de Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats batallan contra Angélica en un lavadero de carros. / Tommy y su guía mística Sabu, cruzan el patio de los Pickles en medio de una ola de calor, para llegar a la “tierra de las aguas” y combatir su sed.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hechizados con un cuento del Abuelo, los Rugrats llegan a una feria medieval y creen que se encuentran en la Tierra de las Hadas. / Después de visitar al médico, Carlitos adquiere un sentido del olfato superior y se siente sumamente libre.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats se hacen amigos de un pavo en el día de Acción de Gracias.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finally lands a blow against the killer giraffe, but Luffy still can’t find a way to break through against Lucci! Can Frank reach Robin before it’s too late!?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro unleashes a demonic nine sword fighting style on his giraffe opponent, Luffy buys time for Franky by ascending to second gear, and Robin refuses to give up hope of being rescued!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Spandam cruely drags Robin ever closer to the gates of justice, but the battle takes a turn for the better when the Sniper King makes a surprise appearance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s battle with Lucci reveals the powerful secrets of the rubber man’s second gear, and the Spandam’s thoughtless Buster Call begins with a brutal barrage of cannonballs.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When an ancient tree is stolen by a madman with the power to freeze time, Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji track down the culprit in an attempt to save a village’s annual festival!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Zoro, and company find themselves trapped in a tunnel filled with rapidly rising water. Meanwhile, Luffy musters the strength for one last stand in his battle with Lucci.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Flashback to the dark past of Rob Lucci as the young boy learns to dispense a cold, cruel, and brutal brand of justice. Back in real time, Luffy’s battle with Lucci threatens to destroy the navy fleet.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s gigantic attack on Lucci takes a devastating toll on his body, Robin rejoins the fight, and the rest of the Straw Hats struggle to survive underwater!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to a little help from what appears to be a mermaid, the Straw Hats find themselves reunited aboard an escape vessel, but the fate of Luffy and the Franky Family is yet to be determined!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pushes his body to the breaking point in his battle with Lucci, and the rest of the Straw Hats try to fight off a fleet of Marines until their captain returns – if he ever does.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy lies battered and badly beaten, but Usopp’s desperate pleas inspire the rubber-man to mount one final, furious attack on Rob Lucci!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their leader crippled by exhaustion and their escape ship destroyed, the Straw Hats find themselves with only one treacherous option: throwing themselves into the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are rescued by the unexpected arrival of a dear old friend, but they’ll have to avoid a barrage of deadly cannonballs in order to survive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats bid a tearful farewell to the brave little ship that was their home for so very many adventures. Rest in peace, Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats get some much needed rest and relaxation, Franky makes a big announcement, and Vice Admiral Garp tracks down his grandson!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s friends are shocked to learn that his grandpa is a marine hero, but that’s nothing compared to how surprised they’ll be by his father’s true identity!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy gets the chance to catch up with his old friend Coby, Nami does some serious snooping, and Robin is paid a chilling visit from a terrifying face from her past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shanks visits Whitebeard with a serious request, Franky and Iceberg begin construction on a ship for the Straw Hats, and news spreads of the events at Enies Lobby.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Chopper risk their lives to help a heartbroken young girl track down her long lost pet!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro’s day takes a turn for the crazy when his search for a new sword is derailed by a couple of meddling orphans!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji spends the day with a very old chef who teaches him the secret of packing amazing flavor into each and every dish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky and Iceberg stay up all night on a mission to finish a new ship for the Straw Hats, but the first light of day brings troubling news!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their new ship completed, Luffy and the gang get ready to set sail, but first, they’ll have to steal some underpants in order to secure the services of a shipwright!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A series of flashbacks to his younger days – and some painful persuasion by Robin – help Franky make the difficult decision to leave his friends and go to sea with the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats are ready for their next adventure, but before they can move on they must await the return of Usopp – and avoid a barrage of cannonballs courtesy of Garp!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats’ new ship gets a name, and Franky shows off some of its special features as the gang goes sky high to avoid being sunk by the marines!

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When an elderly woman finds her husband murdered in bed, police race to find the cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After an avid outdoorsman dies from an apparent suicide, South Carolina investigators must unravel a murky story of mental health struggles and a complicated marriage that led to his death.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A grandmother is reported missing in Virginia weeks before her burned body is found in another state's woods; police navigate family tensions to uncover the truth behind her murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a beloved grandfather is found shot dead in his Florida home, detectives fear his missing ex-wife is also in danger; as they uncover a tangled web of romance, infidelity and betrayal, new questions arise about her involvement in the murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A father of four vanishes days before Christmas; what authorities believe to be a bond violation, unfolds into something evil.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Numerous patients at a Texas dialysis treatment center have gone into cardiac arrest, resulting in five deaths in one month; investigators work with the Centers for Disease Control to expose a chilling connection between the unexplained tragedies.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a father is found dead in his family's Florida mansion, what at first appears to be suicide turns into a complex murder mystery where a mother's cryptic words and a son's suspicious behavior suggest either could be hiding a deadly grudge.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a woman survives an alleged assault in the New Mexico desert and her purported attacker is found stabbed to death, investigators must get to the bottom of a bizarre murder plot driven by one suspect's obsession with the occult.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a 911 hang-up, Pasco, Wash., police report to the caller's address and discover a beloved grandmother has been fatally shot; detectives will combat self-defense claims as evidence of a greedy scheme comes to light.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: An aspiring young artist from Virginia is reported missing by his family. When his body is found weeks later, investigators must delve into his tumultuous family life and uncover an eyewitness who reveals the lies and deceit that led to his murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A man's body is discovered in his Texas home, hidden for weeks after his murder; when police discover that his family is missing as well, the investigation reveals a desperate escape attempt and a motive rooted in fear and betrayal.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A son is reported missing after he fails to return home from a date; various Mississippi agencies unite to navigate his last moments and a false lead that will expose a cold-blooded scheme.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a man is found dead at a secluded rest stop, Ohio police suspect foul play within his family; as evidence builds, tensions rise, and reveal the work of a criminal mastermind intent on manipulating everyone around them.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After the body of a small-town Mississippi woman is found in her garage and a mystery woman is caught red-handed on scene, police must work to identify a romantic rival obsessed with getting rid of the competition.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A noise complaint turns into a murder investigation for Florida police after they discover a man has been fatally shot in his home; years pass before an unexpected confession will expose a murder-for-hire plot fueled by betrayal and greed.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a local musician is killed in a deliberate hit-and-run, rumors around his small South Carolina town suggest it's the result of an escalating family feud; the investigation reveals a killer hiding in plain sight and driven by revenge.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A North Dakota man dies in the hospital from an apparent heatstroke; when the coroner discovers the cause of death was poisoning, authorities launch a criminal investigation that leads them to a calculating killer with a multi-million-dollar motive.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de dejar la Torre Pokémon acompañados de Haunter, Ash regresa a Ciudad Azafrán con una sola meta en mente: ¡ganar una Medalla de Gimnasio de la poderosa Líder de Gimnasio tipo Psíquico, Sabrina!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando Ash intenta atrapar a un Mankey salvaje, este pierde el control y usa Golpe contra todo el grupo; ¡incluso roba la gorra de Ash! ¿Encontrará Ash la forma de apaciguar a este belicoso Pokémon?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Tras insultar el perfume de la Líder de Gimnasio Erika en una tienda departamental, Ash debe ir a extremos increíbles para poder poner un pie en el Gimnasio Celadon, ¡sin mencionar el considerarlo digno de retarla!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: La Oficial Jenny revela que una ola de sueño afecta al área desde hace varios días. Nuestros héroes sospechan que tiene que ver con la desaparición de varios niños y el porqué los Pokémon no mejoran en el Centro Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ante la insistente petición de Brock, nuestros héroes hacen una parada en un lugar bien conocido por los criadores Pokémon por sus salones de belleza Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: A las afueras de Ciudad Fucsia, nuestros héroes se encuentran con Hitmonchan, un Pokémon tipo Pelea. Sin pensarlo, Ash lo enfrenta, pero Pikachu y él son derrotados. ¿Quién es el misterioso entrenador de este Hitmonchan?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón sumerge a Ciudad Grisácea en la oscuridad, Ash y sus amigos van a investigar a la planta de energía cercana, donde encuentran a Magnemite y un huésped de Grimer. ¿Serán responsables del apagón en la ciudad?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash, Brock, Misty y Pikachu se encuentran muy perdidos en las montañas. Mientras se apresuran por un camino irregular que no aparece en su mapa, ¡de repente oyen una gran explosión!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡En su camino hacia el siguiente reto de Batalla de Gimnasio parece que se han perdido. ¡Ash y sus amigos llegan a una enorme mansión que parece ser la guarida oculta de un ninja! ¿Acaso será el Gimnasio Fucsia?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de tomar el lugar de la herida Lara, ¿podrá Ash controlar a su feroz Ponyta y guiarlo para ganar la carrera anual?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes acompañan a la Oficial Jenny al interior del bosque en persecución de unos cazadores. Pronto descubren a un niño en medio de una manada de Kangaskhan. Su nombre es Tommy y nadie sabe el secreto de su infancia.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de encontrar un muy largo puente que sólo puede cruzarse en bicicleta, un trabajo repartiendo medicina es el boleto perfecto para que Ash y sus amigos lleguen a Pueblo Soleado.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Atrapados en un repentino chubasco, nuestros héroes rápidamente buscan refugio. Tras arrastrar a una renuente Misty, Ash y Brock entran a una cabaña, ¡y de inmediato tienen la impresión de que no están solos!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Los chicos descubren a un grupo de Pikachu salvajes, y aunque al principio parecen asustados por el intruso, el grupo eventualmente confía en el Pikachu de Ash. ¿Qué sentirá Pikachu al ver a otros como él en la naturaleza?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos encuentran una enorme casa con una fiesta de jardín en marcha a la que asisten los Entrenadores de los Pokémon que evolucionan usando Rocas Evolutivas. ¿Estará aquí el Entrenador del Eevee abandonado?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros hambrientos héroes llegan a una pequeña aldea. A cambio de una comida, Ash, Misty y Brock aceptan investigar qué está causando que se seque el río, lo cual destruye la cosecha de la aldea.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Acompañamos a nuestros héroes a las afueras de Ciudad Oscura, la cual parece estar desierta. No hay nadie en las calles, incluso a mediodía. ¿Qué volvió a este un lugar tan desolado?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash entrena rigurosamente incluso en las vacaciones de primavera, ¡hasta que nuestros héroes descubren que hay un carnaval rodante cercano! ¡Ash, Misty y Brock pronto se unen a la diversión de la feria!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Aún en persecución de nuestros héroes, el Equipo Rocket está listo para otro intento de atrapar a Pikachu, ¡hasta que el desastre se presenta! Pronto se vuelve evidente que Meowth está enfermándose.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Haciendo a un lado su idea de atrapar a Jigglypuff por ahora, Misty promete hallar una solución para la situación de canto de este Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Según el rival de Ash, Gary, se han descubierto fósiles de Pokémon extintos en el área, iniciando una gran fiebre de fósiles en el cañón. ¡Ash decide unirse a las excavaciones para tratar de derrotar a Gary!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash duerme pacíficamente hasta que es despertado por Brock y Misty con alarmantes noticias: ¡Algo le pasa a la voz de Pikachu! Preocupado, Ash corre con Pikachu en busca del Centro Pokémon más cercano.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Mientras nuestros héroes caminan por la campiña, notan un anuncio de "Personas desaparecidas" con un rostro innegablemente conocido: ¡es exactamente igual que James del Equipo Rocket! ¿De verdad es él el del anuncio?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes discuten el rumor de que un raro Farfetch’d salvaje ha sido visto en el área. Tanto Ash como Misty prometen atraparlo, ¡y pronto tienen su oportunidad cuando el Pokémon aparece!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Al dejar el Centro Pokémon, nuestros héroes discuten lo que creen que saldrá del huevo Pokémon que Ash descubrió. Cerca, el Equipo Rocket comienza a empollar otro atrevido plan para hacerlo suyo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En una batalla con el Rhyhorn de otro Entrenador, el bulbo en la espalda de Bulbasaur empieza a brillar. Ash lo lleva al Centro Pokémon del lugar. Pronto descubren que Bulbasaur no está enfermo, ¡se prepara para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En su camino hacia la Isla Cinnabar, nuestros héroes se unen con la Oficial Jenny y con el Growlithe de la fuerza policíaca en un entrenamiento especial, esperando mejorar las habilidades de batalla de Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: 1800s black powder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When the Enterprise brings aboard Klingon prisoners, an alien entity pits both sides against each other in an ever-escalating struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk is trapped in interphase, while the Enterprise is trapped by a powerful energy web.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Hyper-accelerated aliens, invisible to the naked eye, take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: On a planet doomed to destruction, Kirk, Spock, and McCoy become involved with two aliens who use them as laboratory animals in a bizarre series of tests on an alien empath who may be the savior of her planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock deliver medicine to an insane asylum where a former Starfleet captain is being held. They discover that he has freed the inmates and is running the place.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise hosts two alien beings from the same planet who share an intense and self-destructive hatred of each other.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, McCoy, and Sulu are stranded on a barren planet where a mysterious woman attempts to kill them one at a time, while the Enterprise must travel halfway across the galaxy to rescue them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must deal with incorporeal cloud-like aliens who have already destroyed the inhabitants of a library planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: While seeking a cure for a fever ravaging the Enterprise, Kirk and Spock encounter Flint, a hermit-like Earthman, and his beautiful young ward.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise picks up a group of space "hippies" looking for Eden.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Tired of workplace mistreatment at the hands of his brother, Rom organizes all of Quark's employees into a union and goes on strike against the bar.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A legendary Bajoran appears mysteriously after more than two hundred years and challenges Sisko's claim to be the Emissary.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The Klingon Empire accuses Worf of wantonly destroying a Klingon civilian ship during a battle.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: After an alien race implants false memories of a twenty-year prison sentence into O'Brien's brain, he has trouble readjusting to station life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko follows his son into a war-torn alternate universe after Jake is lured there by the living counterpart of his late mother.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While Odo provides shelter for a pregnant Lwaxana Troi, Jake Sisko falls under the spell of a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko is shocked to learn that his girlfriend, Kasidy Yates, may be a Maquis smuggler.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Attempting to stop a group of Jem'Hadar renegades from gaining power, Sisko and the Defiant crew must join forces with deadly Jem'Hadar soldiers.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bashir tries to save a Gamma Quadrant society afflicted with an incurable, terminal disease by the Jem'Hadar.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Misdiagnosed with a terminal disease, Quark sells his body parts on the Ferengi market to pay off his debts, then finds himself unable to break the contract.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo is forced to return to the homeworld of his people and face judgment for killing one of his own.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A severely injured crewmember's life hangs in the balance as Sisko battles for control of a crashed Jem'Hadar warship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Worf helps Quark woo a visiting Klingon woman, even though he is in love with her.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Geordi is brainwashed by the Romulans to assassinate a Klingon ambassador.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Both Capt. Picard and Lt. Worf must decide where their priorities lie as the Klingon Empire descends into civil war.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard risks all-out war with the Romulans when he involves Starfleet in a Klingon civil war.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew is rendered helpless when Picard is kidnapped and forced to go to war with an alien captain.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard suspects a high-level Federation conspiracy when the crew is ordered to locate the terrorist leader of a renegade race.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard struggles to communicate with a mysterious, destructive force before a visiting scientist can destroy it.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The lives of the crew are in Troi's hands when a natural disaster forces her to take over as captain of the seriously damaged Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The fate of the Federation is in Wesley Crusher's hands when he returns to find the crew of the Enterprise addicted to a dangerous new game.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard and Mr. Spock clash over a proposed reunification of the Romulans and the Vulcans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard and Data travel to investigate an unauthorized mission undertaken by the Federation's legendary Mr. Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard's quest to save an endangered planet leads him to violate a Prime Directive when he seeks advice from a visitor from the future.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Worf learns some painful lessons about parenting when his son Alexander arrives to join his father on the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A young boy who is the sole survivor of a devastated ship becomes obsessed with simulating Data.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay is stranded on a planet inhabited by natives with ties to his ancestors.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kes makes contact with Ocampa spacefarers and the female Caretaker, who may have the power to send the crew home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The theft of a transporter module by Kazon forces thrusts Chakotay into an explosive confrontation with his traitorous former lover Seska.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway must escape from a city under siege by the Mokra, a brutal regime determined to crush the growing resistance movement against it.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After Torres reactivates a humanoid robot, she's drawn into a war between robotic enemies.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Hoping to strengthen Voyager's strategic position in the quadrant, Janeway reluctantly seeks an alliance with the Kazon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Paris makes history by becoming the first person to cross the transwarp threshold, but could pay for the achievement with his life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres races against time to stop a deadly self-guided missile on a collision course with disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A rebel Q escapes from incarceration and demands asylum on Voyager so he can commit suicide.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix helps smoke out the crewmember who has been passing Federation secrets to the Kazon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A space anomaly generates a duplicate Voyager and crew, but only one ship can survive an assault by Vidiian invaders.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Senator Kinsey suffers an assassination attempt while campaigning for the presidency, and O'Neill is caught on tape leaving the building where the shots were fired. With O'Neill behind bars, Carter, Teal'c and Jonas must prove his innocence.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Colonel Maybourne visits O'Neill and claims to have a key to a cache of alien technology, but demands a presidential pardon in exchange for it. When SG-1 accompanies Maybourne to retrieve it, they find his intentions may not be all they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers that Nirrti is mutating the inhabitants of an unexplored planet with a machine that rearranges their DNA. Captured in an attempt to stop her, O'Neill must find a way to escape before he and SG-1 are subjected to the same fate.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Upon arriving at a new planet, M5S-224, the team discovers that they can gate back to Earth. The team sets out, with the intention of returning thanks to a new hyperdrive. But when the engines suddenly explode, the team deals with a new situation.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and Teyla discover that a massive storm is approaching the city. The team must evacuate the city, and the Manarians offer to give them shelter. As they work to figure out a way to power up the shield, the city is invaded by the Genii.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) plays a dangerous game of cat and mouse as he attempts to regain control of Atlantis from the Genii, who have taken the city along with Weir (Torri Higginson) and McKay (David Hewlett) hostage.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and McKay set out, along with two scientists, to explore when they stumble upon a distress beacon coming from a Wraith ship. When they move to investigate, they discover that the ship has been sending out it's SOS signal for 10,000 years.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A team of scientists are surveying the city for damage after the storm when they unknowingly release a virus causing hallucinations and death. The virus infects McKay, Zelenka, and Ford leaving Sheppard to stop it from spreading further.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While searching a new planet, Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) and the team find a paradise world, Proculus, that would make an ideal sanctuary for those fleeing from the Wraith. The local inhabitants, however, believe their goddess will not permit it.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an exploration of the city, Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) and the team find an old woman in suspended animation. Thinking her to be an Ancient, the team wakes her up, only to discover that it is Dr. Weir (Torri Higginson).

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches for a valuable Zero Point Module rumored to be hidden on the planet Dagan, where the Sudarians were trusted with the module over 10,000 years ago. In their search the team begin to worry about their new allies, and their motives

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With no recollection of how they got to the Destiny, crew members left behind over a year earlier make a mysterious return. After an unsettling turn, the memories stirred through regression therapy prove disastrous for those who’ve returned.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The death of an officer under mysterious circumstances creates paranoia among the men. Crozier discovers some of the crew may be considering mutiny.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Hope comes in strange forms, and the question of what the men are willing to do to survive begins to be settled in both noble and horrifying ways.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The expedition's epic journey reaches its climax as men find themselves in a final confrontation with the Inuit mythology they've trespassed into.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon aids Joe as the Clark family descends into crisis. Cameron envisions a new future for Mutiny that may not include everyone.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Tensions rise at the office as Gordon and Donna's personal life spills into work. Meanwhile, Joe meets with the MacMillan board.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Charles "Lucky" Luciano is found guilty of running a prostitution ring and goes to prison. Vito Genovese becomes acting boss, but not for long...

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: World War II begins, and the military asks Charles "Lucky" Luciano to aid in the war effort. Thomas Dewey considers letting him go.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Charles "Lucky" Luciano takes over Vito Genovese's heroin ring in Italy while Genovese and Carlo Gambino plot against the mob leadership.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Vito Genovese and Carlo Gambino finally make their move. When Genovese becomes a liability, Luciano must choose an heir to lead the mob.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When young Jessy is afraid of going to the hair salon, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Hairdresser to show Jessy just how fun a visit to the salon can be. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dentist to help Jessy with a painful new tooth.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a babysitter to help babysit Jessy who, because of eating a magic bean, has grown into a giant baby! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a choreographer to help Thunderbell apologize to his friend, Mr. Sloth, in a truly musical way.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Kiki's crown loses a jewel, Rainbow Ruby becomes an Archaeologist and follows a map to an ancient treasure. // It's New Year's in Rainbow Village and everyone has gathered for the special dumpling feast.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki's is upset when her garden is a mess. Ruby becomes a gardener and makes the garden lovely. // Mysterious gifts are being left for people across Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Detective to work out who or what is leaving the gifts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the Rainbow Village train won't stop running on the track, Rainbow Ruby becomes a firefighter to bring the train to a stop. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a fashion designer and makes fantastically fruity outfits to save the day.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a lifeguard to help Ling Ling learn how to swim! //Thunderbell cannot find his beloved pet fish, so Rainbow Ruby becomes a detective to help solve the mystery and learns that the fish was actually a tadpole who is turning into a frog.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a party planner and holds a party that satisfies both Prince Frederick and Princess Kiki. // When the poppies make a mess in Rainbow Village's town square, Rainbow Ruby becomes a clean-up engineer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Something is wrong with Kiki's beloved pomeranian on the day of the Rainbow Village Flower Festival, and Rainbow Ruby becomes a veterinarian to save the pup! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a marine biologist to help an injured baby dolphin return home.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Chirpee's bird friends come for a visit and want to perch on people's heads. // Prince Frederick comes to observe rainbow fish in the lake, only to discover that the water is frozen, and the fish are gone for the season.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The moon is gone, and the villagers can't sleep without his friendly “goodnight, sweet dreams!” // When Thunderbell adds too much bubble bath to his tub, he is trapped in a giant soap bubble.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby becomes an architect to help redesign Felicia's house after it accidentally gets destroyed by Gina. // Gina brings a machine to make rainbow sorbet for everyone.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Thunderbell discovers an unknown, delicious fruit, he eats up all of it at once. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When three little stars run away to Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes an astronaut to return them safely to space. // When Kiki breaks a gem given to her by Prince Frederick, she doesn't get a chance to see its special sparkle.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: During a camping trip in the forest, the Rainbow Village friends see a “monster” and almost cancel the trip. // When Princess Kiki chips her leg before a ballet performance, Rainbow Ruby must take the stage to save the day!

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell's scooter breaks, and he must deliver packages on foot, which is slow and painful. // When Ling Ling's group portrait gift is ruined, Rainbow Ruby secretly takes photos and surprises him with a photo album of all of their friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the restaurant is overrun with customers who aren't being served properly, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Waitress. // When Ruby's spilled marbles pour down on Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Paramedic to treat the wounded.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard visits the Grand Canyon, then helps a homeowner with a new type of water softener. Ross demonstrates a home organization app. Tom builds a shadow box using wood from a salvaged door.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom teaches a young fan how to build a tool box. Scott installs smart smoke and carbon monoxide detectors; Richard installs an expansion tank to fix a leaking temperature and pressure relief valve.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom teaches a homeowner a simple tiling technique; Richard demonstrates a wireless leak detector that prevents floods; Jenn installs a water feature that collects and reuses rainwater.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard breaks down the differences between water filters; Roger removes a tree that’s leaning dangerously; Tom demonstrates ways to locate studs in a wall; Scott installs a smart garage door opener.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger teaches how to care for orchids; Tom fixes an improperly hung window; Mark demonstrates how to clean brick with acid; Ross finds a solar panel that can generate drinking water from air.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows how to repair a damaged walkway, and also how to identify what caused the damage so it can be prevented; Tom patches a chipped wood floor using a Dutchman and hand tools.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Bernard Hopkins vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 2004, Bernard Hopkins fought Oscar De La Hoya for the undisputed world middleweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. After a quiet first eight rounds, Hopkins finished De La Hoya with a brutal body shot in the ninth round.

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Miguel Acosta
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2011, Brandon Rios fought Miguel Acosta for the WBA World Lightweight Title at the Palms in Las Vegas. In a great back-and-forth fight, Brandon Rios knocked down Acosta hard, stopping him in the 10th round.

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Mike Alvarado 1
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2012, Brandon Rios fought Mike Alvarado for the WBO Latino Super Lightweight Title in Carson, California. Showing his quickness and agility, Rios put on a show with a 7th round TKO victory.

programme.title: Chris Eubank vs Nigel Benn 1
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1990, Chris Eubank fought Nigel Benn for the WBO Middleweight Title at the Resorts World Arena in Birmingham, UK. Eubank's constant pressure on Benn and powerful punching led him to stop Benn in the ninth round.

programme.title: Devin Haney vs Rafael Vazquez
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Devin Haney and Rafael Vazquez fought eachother at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 4 rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Haney.

programme.title: Diego Corrales vs Jose Luis Castillo
programme.desc: On May 7th, 2005 Diego Corrales faced Jose Luis Castillo for WBC and WBO World Lightweight titles at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas in a bout that went 10 rounds that ended in technical knockout giving the win to Corrales.

programme.title: Donald Curry vs Milton McCrory
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1985, Donald Curry fought Milton McCrory for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Welterweight Titles in Las Vegas. Putting on the pressure early, Donald Curry came out firing, knocking out McCrory in the second round.

programme.title: Eddie Mustafa Muhammad vs Marvin Johnson
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Eddie Mustafa Muhammad fought Marvin Johnson for the WBA World Light Heavyweight title that went 11 out of 15 rounds and ended by technical knockout giving the victory to Muhammad.

programme.title: Efe Ajagba vs Brian Howard
programme.desc: On April 10th, 2021 Efe Ajagba faced Brian Howard at the Osage Casino in Tulsa, Ok. With the fight ending by knockout in the third round securing the win for Ajagba.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Chris Diaz
programme.desc: On April 24th, 2021 Emanuel Navarrete and Chris Diaz fought for the WBO World Featherweight title at the Silver Spurs Arena, Kissimmee that resulted with a technical knockout in the 12th round securing Navarretes victory.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Isaac Dogboe 1
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2018, Emanuel Navarrete fought Isaac Dogboe for the WBO World Super Bantamweight Title at the Madison Square Garden Theater in New York. Navarrete was the more aggressive fighter in the match, earning the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Isaac Dogboe 2
programme.desc: On May 11th, 2019, Emanuel Navarrete rematched Isaac Dogboe for the WBO World Super Bantamweight Title in Tucson. Navarrete put on an impressive performance, scoring two knockdowns and stopping Dogboe in the final round.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Joet Gonzalez
programme.desc: On October 15th, 2021, Emanuel Navarrete fought Joet Gonzalez for the WBO World Featherweight Title at Pechanga Arena in San Diego. In an incredible battle, Emanuel Navarrete pulled out an impressive unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs In Jin Chi
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001, Erik Morales fought In Jin Chi for the WBC Featherweight Title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles. Defending his title, Erik Morales put on the pressure to do enough to get the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: On February 19th, 2000 Erik Morales fought Marco Antonio Barrera for WBC and WBO World Super Bantamweight titles at Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas which ended in a split decision victory for Morales.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.desc: Sit down with the men of "Season 2" who dare to drive over the frozen ocean and river waters of the Arctic, and learn why they risk their lives for the job.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
